Fabrício Ferraz Gerardi

I am a (computational) linguist working at the University of Tübingen. I mainly work with Amazonian languages (specially Tupían and Arawan families): language structure, syntax (RRG), and typology.

I love good coffee and the Amazon (the forest).

News

Aug 23, 2022 TuLaR will be presenting in SLE - 2022, in Bucarest. Abstract here
Jul 25, 2022 TuLaR will be presenting in ICHL, Oxford. Abstract here
Jul 24, 2022 TuLaR will be presenting in HENNIGXXXIX, in Helsinki. Abstract here, on page 23-24
Jul 1, 2022 The TuLaR Team presented work about linguistic description, documentation and creation of NLP resources in SIGUL, Marseille.
